name: Shao-Shan (Seamus) Chang
headline: M.S. Financial Engineering Candidate @ UIUC
bio: I'm a graduate student in Financial Engineering at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, with a B.S. in Information Sciences + Data Science (GPA 3.93). I build things at the intersection of finance, data, and software — from ML models that predict crypto market volatility to consumer credit risk simulations.
